creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
I installed the package, then wondered, what next? 

WWW <https://www.kde.org/> is not wallpaper-oriented. Is there a better URL?

Via FreshPorts, <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/blob/main/x11-themes/wallpapers-freebsd-kde/pkg-plist> there's a list of files, however the .js file was a mystery.
